nasb.text: For it is not an idle word for you; indeed it is your life. And by this word you will prolong your days in the land, which you are about to cross the Jordan to possess.”

esv.text: For it is no empty word for you, but your very life, and by this word you shall live long in the land that you are going over the Jordan to possess.”

cnv.text: 因為這不是空洞、與你們無關重要的事，而是你們的生命；藉著這事，你們在過約旦河去得為業的地上，才可以日子長久。”

ccb.text: 这律法不是空话，而是你们的生命。你们若遵守这律法，就必长住在约旦河对岸你们将要占领的土地上。”
